entities.name: Vrijen Attawar
entities.context: Author of the position; founder of Careerspan with a decade of career coaching experience

entities.name: Employers Created the Trust Crisis
entities.context: Core belief that employers caused current hiring dysfunction by filtering on superficial signals rather than understanding candidates as humans

entities.name: Superficial Signal Filtering
entities.context: Hiring practice of filtering on prestigious degrees, brand-name employers, and keywords instead of evaluating candidates holistically

entities.name: Automating Away Humanity
entities.context: V's framing of how employers removed human understanding from hiring through over-reliance on automated, shallow screening

entities.name: Candidate Gaming
entities.context: Rational candidate response to broken hiring systems — optimizing for signals rather than authenticity

entities.name: Hiring Arms Race
entities.context: Escalating cycle where employer filtering breeds candidate gaming, which breeds more filtering, unless the evaluation paradigm changes

entities.name: Evaluation Paradigm Shift
entities.context: V's position that employers must fundamentally change how they evaluate candidates to break the dysfunction cycle

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company, positioned in the career coaching and hiring intelligence space

relationships.context: A core worldview position — employers bear primary responsibility for hiring dysfunction
The mechanism by which employers created the crisis: filtering on degrees, brands, keywords
Automation amplified superficial filtering, removing human judgment from candidate evaluation
Candidates rationally game the system in response to superficial employer filtering
Gaming and counter-filtering create an escalating arms race between employers and candidates
Only a fundamental change in employer evaluation can break the escalation cycle
V advocates for employers to fundamentally rethink how they assess candidates
Founder — Careerspan operates in the space this position critiques
Careerspan's mission aligns with transforming how employers evaluate talent
